value.found_quote: The end-of-turn and commit reviews run as a separate Claude call with a fresh context and a security-focused prompt: the reviewer starts from the diff, has no investment in the original approach, and is instructed only to find problems.
value.rationale: The page has a section titled "Review independence and limits" that explicitly states the end-of-turn and commit reviews run as a separate Claude call with a fresh context, matching the claim. The plugin is described as available on all plans, indicating active status.
